  field Descriptor.Annotations []github.com/syssam/velox/schema.Annotation
  field Descriptor.Edges []string
  field Descriptor.Fields []string
  field Descriptor.StorageKey string
  field Descriptor.Unique bool
  method Builder.Annotations(...github.com/syssam/velox/schema.Annotation) *Builder
  method Builder.Descriptor() *Descriptor
  method Builder.Edges(...string) *Builder
  method Builder.Fields(...string) *Builder
  method Builder.StorageKey(string) *Builder
  method Builder.Unique() *Builder
func Edges(...string) *Builder
func Fields(...string) *Builder
type Builder struct
type Descriptor struct
